uiBuilder.label: Record Form
uiBuilder.description: Production-grade self-fetching record form. Reads layout from sys_ui_form/section/element, field metadata from sys_dictionary, choices from sys_choice, UI policies from sys_ui_policy, and UI actions from sys_ui_action. Renders fields with correct Horizon components. Supports collapsible sections, responsive grid, policy-driven field rules, and configurable action bar.

properties.name: sysId
properties.label: Record Sys ID
properties.description: The sys_id of the record to display.

properties.name: formView
properties.label: Form view
properties.description: Form view title as configured in the form builder (e.g. Default view, ITIL, Workspace).

properties.name: formTitle
properties.label: Form title
properties.description: Heading shown above the form. Leave empty to hide.

properties.name: actionBarPosition
properties.label: Action bar position
properties.description: Where to render the UI action buttons and Save button.

properties.name: formLayout
properties.label: Form layout
properties.description: Classic mirrors the form's column splits (the .split layout, default). Responsive ignores splits and flows fields in sequence into 1–4 columns based on the available width.

properties.name: autoSaveFields
properties.label: Auto-save fields
properties.description: JSON array of field names that PATCH immediately on blur, e.g. ["short_description"]. All other fields require the Save button.

properties.name: readonly
properties.label: Read-only
properties.description: When on, all fields are read-only and the Save button is hidden. UI action buttons are still shown.

actions.name: RECORD_FORM_FIELD_CHANGED
actions.label: Field changed
actions.description: Fired when any field value changes (on blur). Payload: { name, value }.

payload.name: name
payload.label: Field name
payload.description: Column name of the changed field.

actions.name: RECORD_FORM_FIELD_AUTO_SAVED
actions.label: Field auto-saved
actions.description: Fired when an auto-save field is successfully PATCHed. Payload: { name, value }.

actions.name: RECORD_FORM_SAVED
actions.label: Form saved
actions.description: Fired when Save successfully PATCHes all non-auto-save dirty fields. Payload: { values }.

payload.name: values
payload.label: Saved values
payload.description: Object of { fieldName: value } that was PATCHed to the record.

actions.name: RECORD_FORM_UI_ACTION_TRIGGERED
actions.label: UI action triggered
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks a sys_ui_action button. Bind to a REST/transform to execute the action. Payload: { name, actionName, sysId, table, values }.

payload.name: name
payload.label: Action label
payload.description: Display label of the clicked action (e.g. 'Update', 'Resolve').

payload.name: actionName
payload.label: Action name
payload.description: Internal action_name (e.g. 'sysverb_update'). Use this to identify the action in bindings.

payload.name: sysId
payload.label: Record Sys ID
payload.description: The sys_id of the record the form is editing.

payload.name: values
payload.label: Current form values
payload.description: All current field values at the time the action was triggered.

actions.name: RECORD_FORM_LOAD_ERROR
actions.label: Form load error
actions.description: Fired when form layout or record fetch fails. Payload: { error }.

actions.name: RECORD_FORM_SAVE_ERROR
actions.label: Form save error
actions.description: Fired when a PATCH (auto-save or Save button) fails. Payload: { error }.
